component.name: cosmic-toys
component.summary: PowerToys-style toolbox for the COSMIC desktop

description.p: A growing collection of small COSMIC-native utilities, modeled after Microsoft PowerToys. One app, one settings page, one set of hotkeys — and the tools share infrastructure so adding more is cheap.

ul.li: Color Picker — magnifier-on-cursor overlay, pixel-precision sampling, clipboard delivery, HEX/RGB/HSL/HSV/OKLCH readouts, recents history

description.p: A long-running daemon owns each tool's background work so its hotkey keeps firing whether the GUI is open or not. New tools land in upcoming releases.
Distribution release: prebuilt .deb / .rpm / AUR / static-tarball via GitHub Actions on tag push. No functional changes from 0.2.0.
First tagged release as a standalone color picker app for COSMIC. (Renamed to cosmic-toys in 0.3.0.)
